title: 1.1: Tests that consuming a file through the full pipeline results in a document with parsed text content
1.2: Tests that the normal consumption flow produces a document with a title derived from the input filename
1.3: Tests that after normal consumption the document's source file exists on disk
1.4: Tests that after normal consumption the document's thumbnail file exists on disk
1.5: Tests that after normal consumption the document's archive file exists on disk
1.6: Tests that the original input file is removed after successful consumption
1.7: Tests that consuming a document with an overridden title stores the overridden value as the document title
1.8: Tests that document filenames follow the configured format pattern with correspondent and title placeholders
1.9: Tests that document consumption produces accessible files on disk when the filename generation function returns different names on repeated calls
1.10: Tests that the consumed document is assigned the correspondent predicted by the mocked classifier
1.11: Tests that the consumed document is assigned the document type predicted by the mocked classifier
1.12: Tests that the consumed document is assigned the tags predicted by the mocked classifier
1.13: Tests that consuming multiple files with similar base names but different extensions results in documents with unique filenames without collisions
2.1: Places the test for normal end-to-end consumption in src/documents/tests/test_consumer.py
2.2: Places the test for custom filename format handling in src/documents/tests/test_consumer.py
2.3: Places the test for unstable filename generation in src/documents/tests/test_consumer.py
2.4: Places the test for document classification in src/documents/tests/test_consumer.py
2.5: Places the test for similar filename collision handling in src/documents/tests/test_consumer.py
3.1: All tests use the Django TestCase framework
3.2: All tests use self.assert* methods for assertions
3.3: All tests follow the test method naming convention starting with 'test'
3.4: All tests that require mocking use Python's unittest.mock module
4.1: Consumption tests are placed within a test class that inherits from DirectoriesMixin
